scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.build:grova: pnpm --filter @workspace/instagram-clone run build && pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run build
scripts.dev:grova: concurrently -k -n api,web -c blue,green "pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run dev" "pnpm run dev:web"
scripts.start:grova: pnpm run build:grova && cross-env NODE_ENV=production PORT=5000 pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run start
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
scripts.typecheck:grova: pnpm --filter @workspace/instagram-clone run typecheck && pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run typecheck
